Watts Creek Pathway

Edit
Part of NCC Greenbelt →

Paved pathway following Watts Creek through the western Greenbelt

Tap to explore
A well-maintained paved pathway following Watts Creek through the western Greenbelt. Popular with commuters connecting Kanata to the Ottawa River Pathway. The creek section through the forest is especially nice in autumn — the canopy turns gold and the path is quiet on weekday mornings.
Know this path? Help improve this page — every edit can be undone.
